name: Partially my fault I hurt back at work, get benefits?

mainEntity.name: Partially my fault I hurt back at work, get benefits?

acceptedAnswer.description: **Yes, workers comp is no-fault system.** Doesn't matter if careless[3]. **Key factors:** Still in course of employment. **Practical guidance:** Don't admit fault to insurer, focus on facts. Full benefits apply[1][2]. **Unlike personal injury suits.**
